summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 12+ years of professional experience building production web applications, backend integrations, and cloud-native systems across B2B SaaS, enterprise platforms, marketplaces, and Web3 security. Strong fit for Dalet's Dalia team with hands-on TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Angular, Kubernetes, Terraform, and API and ETL integration work, plus adjacent LLM workflow experience through an OpenAI-based reporting prototype and practical AI tooling side projects. Delivered measurable results including cutting monorepo build times from about 15 minutes to 3 minutes, improving API response times by 35%, reducing release cycles from one week to less than 24 hours, and saving $75,000 annually by building an internal integration platform.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Co-led OpenZeppelin Defender 2.0 Secure Audit as one of two engineers, building a React and TypeScript frontend with Zustand so auditors could track findings, verify fixes, and deliver final PDF reports with clients.
Built SDK capabilities for Defender and OSS Relayer so technical teams could integrate the products and build custom automation tooling.
Owned the EVM side of the Rust-based open-source Relayer, including RPC balancing, retry and failover behavior, AWS KMS and GCP KMS signer integrations, and a fix for a critical nonce race condition.
Refactored the TypeScript monorepo build system, cutting build times from about 15 minutes to 3 minutes in local and CI runs while reducing bundle size and speeding up pull request cycles.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Built a React and TypeScript presentation feature in MyPremise that surfaced up-to-date, often live data through a single shareable URL for account managers and clients.
Contributed to the migration from REST to GraphQL with Apollo, including Express.js service updates, improving API response times by 35% and lowering server usage.
Improved release reliability with broader Jest coverage and GitHub Actions quality gates, cutting release cycles from one week to less than 24 hours.
Built an internal hackathon proof of concept with the OpenAI API for natural-language report generation.

workExperience.title: System Architect
description: Improved architecture and delivery for a legacy internal platform, working across product, engineering, and infrastructure teams to reduce delivery cycles from months to about two weeks.
Modernized core parts of the stack by moving from ASP.NET to Angular and from .NET Framework to .NET Core, removing Internet Explorer-only constraints and enabling modern browser support.
Introduced DevOps practices and led a staged migration from on-prem systems to Azure hybrid infrastructure across applications, databases, jobs, storage, and networking.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Built backend integrations for merchant ingestion pipelines, normalizing data from FTP, APIs, SOAP XML feeds, and web scraping to support pricing, stock, availability, bundles, and product attributes.
Led development of an internal integration and onboarding platform with Go, Node.js, and Angular, removing dependency on external engineering support and saving $75,000 annually.

Implemented real-time catalog and pricing updates with Go and Kafka, moving core logic from a previous Python ETL flow so product and discount changes reached the app faster and contributed to a 21% increase in CSAT.
Engineered a Redis-based conflict resolution layer for duplicate and out-of-order updates, improving product data accuracy and reliability by 40%.

workExperience.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Delivered more than five web and mobile products end to end across medical, industrial, government, legal, and cultural sectors, working from discovery and requirements through implementation.
Led architecture decisions and set engineering standards for TypeScript, React, and React Native across the company.
Worked directly with clients through discovery calls, demos, and status updates, translating requirements into shipped products under short deadlines.

workExperience.title: Fullstack Developer
description: Helped build Dxpress from idea to launch inside a small product and engineering team, focusing on backend development across Python and Go services.
Developed ETL pipelines that ingested and normalized product data from manual uploads, APIs, web scraping, and FTP CSV files, supporting catalogs with more than 5,000 products.
Applied frontend skills in Angular for operational interfaces while managing metrics, monitoring, and deployment workflows in GCP.

workExperience.title: Junior Software Developer
description: Started as a junior developer and took on growing frontend ownership, helping introduce Node.js and AngularJS into the agency stack.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

targetPosition: Full Stack Engineer - MCP & Micro App Development

company_profile.description: Dalet is a media technology and services provider for media-rich organizations, with software and workflow products for content production, management, distribution, and monetization.
company_profile.mission: Empowering a world where compelling stories are beautifully made, effortlessly told and thoughtfully delivered.
company_profile.vision: Help media-rich organizations create powerful content, develop meaningful connections, and increase authentic engagement.
company_profile.business_model: B2B software and services for media-rich organizations.
recent_signals: Commercial availability of Dalia, Dalet's media-aware agentic AI product, announced in April 2026
Early Dalia deployments reportedly reduced repetitive tasks such as search, tagging, and clipping by up to 60%
Dalet Flex LTS launched with semantic search, faster editing workflows, and an AI-ready foundation for Dalia
